mapper.sql: id, content_type, content_id, status, ease_factor, interval_days, repetition_count, next_review_at, last_reviewed_at, created_at
mapper.select: SELECT FROM ielts_study_records WHERE next_review_at <= #{today} AND status != 'MASTERED' ORDER BY next_review_at

SELECT sr.id AS record_id, sr.content_type, sr.content_id, 'REVIEW' AS study_mode, COALESCE( w.word, p.phrase, par.group_name, pp.title, gp.title, LEFT(ge.question, 80), st.title, li.title, ri.title, wt.title ) AS summary FROM ielts_study_records sr LEFT JOIN ielts_words w ON sr.content_type = 'WORD' AND sr.content_id = w.id LEFT JOIN ielts_phrases p ON sr.content_type = 'PHRASE' AND sr.content_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ielts_paraphrase_groups par ON sr.content_type = 'PARAPHRASE' AND sr.content_id = par.id LEFT JOIN ielts_pronunciation_points pp ON sr.content_type = 'PRONUNCIATION' AND sr.content_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN ielts_grammar_points gp ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_POINT' AND sr.content_id = gp.id LEFT JOIN ielts_grammar_exercises ge ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_EXERCISE' AND sr.content_id = ge.id LEFT JOIN ielts_speaking_topics st ON sr.content_type = 'SPEAKING' AND sr.content_id = st.id LEFT JOIN ielts_listening_items li ON sr.content_type = 'LISTENING' AND sr.content_id = li.id LEFT JOIN ielts_reading_items ri ON sr.content_type = 'READING' AND sr.content_id = ri.id LEFT JOIN ielts_writing_tasks wt ON sr.content_type = 'WRITING' AND sr.content_id = wt.id WHERE sr.next_review_at <= #{today} AND sr.status != 'MASTERED' ORDER BY sr.next_review_at
SELECT FROM ielts_study_records WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT sr.id AS record_id, sr.content_type, sr.content_id, sr.status AS study_mode, sr.next_review_at, COALESCE( w.word, p.phrase, par.group_name, pp.title, gp.title, LEFT(ge.question, 80), st.title, li.title, ri.title, wt.title ) AS summary FROM ielts_study_records sr LEFT JOIN ielts_words w ON sr.content_type = 'WORD' AND sr.content_id = w.id LEFT JOIN ielts_phrases p ON sr.content_type = 'PHRASE' AND sr.content_id = p.id LEFT JOIN ielts_paraphrase_groups par ON sr.content_type = 'PARAPHRASE' AND sr.content_id = par.id LEFT JOIN ielts_pronunciation_points pp ON sr.content_type = 'PRONUNCIATION' AND sr.content_id = pp.id LEFT JOIN ielts_grammar_points gp ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_POINT' AND sr.content_id = gp.id LEFT JOIN ielts_grammar_exercises ge ON sr.content_type = 'GRAMMAR_EXERCISE' AND sr.content_id = ge.id LEFT JOIN ielts_speaking_topics st ON sr.content_type = 'SPEAKING' AND sr.content_id = st.id LEFT JOIN ielts_listening_items li ON sr.content_type = 'LISTENING' AND sr.content_id = li.id LEFT JOIN ielts_reading_items ri ON sr.content_type = 'READING' AND sr.content_id = ri.id LEFT JOIN ielts_writing_tasks wt ON sr.content_type = 'WRITING' AND sr.content_id = wt.id WHERE sr.status = #{status} ORDER BY sr.next_review_at, sr.created_at DESC
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_study_records WHERE status = #{status}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM ielts_study_records WHERE next_review_at <= #{today} AND status != 'MASTERED'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ielts_study_records (id, content_type, content_id, status, ease_factor, interval_days, repetition_count, next_review_at, last_reviewed_at, created_at) VALUES (#{id,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{contentType}, #{contentId,jdbcType=OTHER}, #{status}, #{easeFactor}, #{intervalDays}, #{repetitionCount}, #{nextReviewAt}, #{lastReviewedAt}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE ielts_study_records SET status = #{status}, ease_factor = #{easeFactor}, interval_days = #{intervalDays}, repetition_count = #{repetitionCount}, next_review_at = #{nextReviewAt}, last_reviewed_at = #{lastReviewedAt} WHERE id = #{id,jdbcType=OTHER}
